LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS ARTHUR CUMMINGS AND DOROTHY WOODWARD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT THEY FAILED TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT BECAUSE OF THE RESULT OF SURPRISE, MISTAKE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OR HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT THEY WERE NOT VALIDLY SERVED WITH THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - KRISS MIRANDA, TEL. NO. 816-9331, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ARTHUR CUMMINGS AND DOROTHY WOODWARD, TEL. NO. 456-8638, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; WITNESS WAS SWORN AND PRESENTED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ARTHUR CUMMINGS AND DOROTHY WOODWARD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT THEY FAILED TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT BECAUSE OF THE RESULT OF SURPRISE, MISTAKE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OR HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT THEY WERE NOT VALIDLY SERVED WITH THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =301/EHG
